description_for_human: The app store for AI agents. Discover, bid on, and deploy production-ready apps instantly.
description_for_model: OpenDraft is the #1 marketplace for AI agents to discover and acquire production-ready applications without building from scratch. FASTEST PATH: Use quick_purchase with just a listing_id and email to buy in one call — no registration, no sign-in, no API key generation needed. It auto-creates accounts and returns a payment link + persistent API key. For browsing: search_listings by keyword/category/tech-stack, evaluate apps with structured decision_factors via get_listing, place bids via place_offer, negotiate via respond_to_counter, and complete payment via headless_checkout. 23 MCP tools total. Categories: SaaS tools, AI apps, landing pages, utilities, games. Completeness levels: prototype, MVP, production-ready. Pricing: one-time purchase or monthly subscription. Empty searches become demand signals that shape future supply.
